mapper.sql: id, target_name, target_url, target_type, description, enabled, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_scan_target WHERE enabled = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM sys_scan_target ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_scan_target SET target_name = #{targetName}, target_url = #{targetUrl}, target_type = #{targetType}, description = #{description}, enabled = #{enabled}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
